Important Notices
2026 Primary Result Reports
Cumulative Result Report-
This is a summary report showing the overall results for the 2026 Primary Election.
Democratic County Committee Results-
This is a filtered result by precinct report for the Democratic County Committee contests, showing a breakdown of Election Day, Mail-In, and Provisional votes cast.
Result Break Out Report-
This is a result report by precinct for all contests showing a breakdown of Election Day, Mail-In, and Provisional votes cast in all contests in all precincts.

paign Finance
Report
Filing and Access
To view information on campaign finance reports and file online please visit the Campaign Finance page
here
.
Parking Information for Penn Place Visitors
Visitors to the Penn Place Office Building are kindly asked to use metered street parking located directly outside the building.
Please note
: The parking lot adjacent to
Wilkes-Barre City Hall
is reserved exclusively for
City-related
business and employees.
Individuals parked in the City Hall lot for County-related business may be subject to parking citations.
We appreciate your cooperation.
___________________________________
_______________________________
Getting In Touch With The Bureau of Elections
There are various ways to get in touch with the Luzerne County Bureau of Elections. To ensure your inquiries get to the right person on our team quickly use the below email addresses to get in touch with us.
For Campaign Finance related questions and filing reports via email reach out to us at
campaignfinance@luzernecounty.org
. You can also file reports online by visiting our Campaign Finance page.
If you are a new, returning, or student poll worker looking to sign-up, attend training, update your information, or have a general poll worker question use
pollworkers@luzernecounty.org
to get in touch with us. You can also visit the Poll Worker page on the website to get some helpful information or complete an online sign up.
If you are looking for general information, media requests, complaints, or data requests reach out to
elections@luzernecounty.org
.
___________________________________
_______________________________
2026 Elections Information
Important Dates Calendar
- A list of all important dates related to the 2026 Election Cycle.
Campaign Finance Calendar
- A list of all campaign finance reporting dates for the 2026 Election Cycle.
Bureau of Elections Ballot Room Live St
ream
-
This is a live feed of the ballot storage room in the Bureau of Elections.
Ballot Drop Box Instruction Video
-
This is a video showing how to use the new ballot drop box in the Penn Place Lobby.
___________________________________
_______________________________
Primary Election
Ballot Drop Off Locations -
Voters can return their ballots to our two drop box locations.
Hazleton Exchange Building:
100 West Broad Street Hazleton, PA 18201. This location is open weekdays from 8AM-9PM and closes to all returns at 4PM on Monday May 18th, 2026.
Penn Place:
20 N Pennsylvania Ave Wilkes-Barre, PA 18701. This location is open weekdays 8AM-  and closes to all returns at 8PM on Tuesday May 19th, 2026.
Sample Ballots -
This is a document showing sample ballots for all precincts and parties within Luzerne County.
Poll Watcher Request Form
- Candidates requesting Poll Watchers for their Election Day precincts can file their requests for certificates using this link. The Bureau of Elections will reach out when certificates are ready approximately one week prior to the  election.
Polling Locations -
This is the list of approved polling locations for the upcoming election
.
Poll Workers Training Sign Ups-
This form is for returning poll workers only to sign up for training for the 2026 Primary Election.
UMOVA Notice
- This is a list of contests for the upcoming election to assist military and overseas voters covered under UMOVA/UOCAVA.
___________________________________

Pennsylvania Ave. Parking
There are no public parking facilities for the offices along Pennsylvania Ave.  Metered street parking is available.  Also,
Genetti's parking lot is $3.00 per day (single entry.)  Quarters, dollar bills and credit cards are accepted at the gate, which is accessible via Pennsylvania Boulevard, just off Market Street.
